failure-mode.description: Free-form args — tool defined with `args: object` and no schema; model emits anything; dispatcher crashes downstream.
failure-mode.detector: tools[].args_schema missing OR schema is `additionalProperties: true` with no `properties`
failure-mode.repair: Define proper JSON Schema per tool. Constrain types, enums, min/max where applicable.

failure-mode.description: No sandbox — model emits a `delete_account` call with hallucinated user_id; dispatcher executes without check; data loss.
failure-mode.detector: tool with safety_class==destructive AND no human_gate OR no scoped permission
failure-mode.repair: Gate destructive tools behind explicit human approval. Add CAPABILITIES check before dispatch.

failure-mode.description: Hallucinated tool name — model emits `lookupCustomer` when dispatcher registers `lookup_customer`. Dispatcher 500s.
failure-mode.detector: tool_name not in dispatcher registry; common in cross-provider migrations
failure-mode.repair: Dispatcher MUST return explicit error message naming available tools; model corrects on next turn. Lint tool names for case consistency in tools.yaml.

failure-mode.description: Infinite tool loop — agent calls `search`, finds nothing, calls `search` again with same args, indefinitely.
failure-mode.detector: same (tool_name, args) called >3 times in same conversation
failure-mode.repair: Enforce max tool calls per conversation (10-20); on repeated identical call, return to user with summary of state. Track via conversation-id key.

failure-mode.description: No audit trail — agent did something; nobody can reconstruct what or why; post-incident review impossible.
failure-mode.detector: audit_sink missing OR no record of last 24h tool calls
failure-mode.repair: Wire audit sink (S3, BigQuery, ClickHouse). Log every dispatch with timestamp + caller + args + result. Retain ≥30 days.
